text: DAISY CHAIN MUSIC CLASSES/BABY POP MUSIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers interactive music classes incorporating singing and American Sign Language (ASL) in a playgroup. 1270 Charnelton Street Daisy's Place 2nd Floor Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Ages 0-5 Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 505-1139 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 505-1139 Main phone Main phone (541) 505-1139 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Children's Play Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - FULL SPECTRUM DOULA SUPPORT HUMAN REPRODUCTION - LACTATION AND FEEDING SUPPORT HUMAN REPRODUCTION - NURSING NOOK MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - DANDELION STREET TEAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
